stories.text: GPT-5.6 Sol sets a new state of the art in cybersecurity.
stories.title: GPT-5.6 Sol Achieves Cybersecurity Breakthrough
stories.summary: OpenAI announced that GPT-5.6 Sol has set a new state of the art in cybersecurity applications.
stories.why_it_matters: Demonstrates continued advancement in specialized model capabilities for security engineering.

stories.title: Community Reception of GPT-5.6 Sol
stories.summary: OpenAI highlights the positive community reception of GPT-5.6 Sol.
stories.why_it_matters: Shows strong user adoption and satisfaction with the latest model release.

stories.text: Transformers v5 is here with native GGUF support.
stories.title: Transformers v5 Launches with GGUF Support
stories.summary: Hugging Face released Transformers v5 with native GGUF format support.
stories.why_it_matters: Simplifies local model deployment by integrating the popular GGUF quantization format directly.

stories.text: New blog post on why tool-use is the next frontier for LLM agents.
stories.title: Tool-Use as the Next Frontier for LLM Agents
stories.summary: Andrej Karpathy published a blog post arguing that tool-use capabilities represent the next major frontier for LLM agents.
stories.why_it_matters: Influential perspective on the direction of agent development from a leading AI researcher.

rejections.title: Rejected Story Example
rejections.reason: Summary fabricates a release date not mentioned in original post.
